## Before submitting

Please ensure you have:

- Read the [Contributing Guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- Used descriptive commit messages following [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- Code follows the project style (`pnpm lint` passes)
- Tests added or updated for new functionality
- Build passes (`pnpm build`)
- Documentation updated if applicable
- Added a changeset if this PR affects a published package (`pnpm changeset`)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Optimization
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test coverage
- [ ] Dependencies
- [ ] Breaking change

## Description

<!-- What does this PR do? Why is it needed? -->

## Related

<!--
For pull requests that relate or close an issue, please include them below.
We follow GitHub's guidance on linking issues to pull requests:
https://docs.github.com/en/issues/tracking-your-work-with-issues/linking-a-pull-request-to-an-issue

For example, "closes #1234" connects this PR to issue 1234
and automatically closes it when the PR is merged.
-->

- Related Issue #
- Closes #
